MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Aisha Gillmore, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Lasalle Apartments Limited Partnership.
Attorney, Ivy P. Tseng, specially appearing on behalf of the attorney of record and plaintiff.

Defendant, Diedra Dudley (Sued as Diedea) is present.
Attorneys, Ryan L. Scher and Mitchell M. Blakely representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 50 Osceola Lane, #2, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of June 2, 2008 is vacated.
